name: Rio cloth clutch bag
description: Really Good Condition Black and Gray Hermes Large Zippy Clutch Organizer Billfold Wallet. The zipper on this item works perfectly. The outside of the item is in really good shape with no major rips, tears, or any major damage to mention. The inside of this item is in really good shape with no major rips, tears, or staining damage to mention. The snap closure of the pockets functions perfectly as it should. On the bottom of the lining a few threads have come loose and the lining is coming up just a bit but very hard to notice/see it. Overall it's a very nice looking clutch wallet from the Hermes Fashion House. Please make sure to see all of the photos for the condition of this item! If you have any questions at all please feel free to ask! Will ship out by the next business day!
